title: Red Star Foil Balloons, 18 Inches Star Foil Balloons for Helium, 10 pcs Red Star Birthday Balloons for Birthday Party Graduation Baby Shower Wedding Anniversary Party Decorations
features: Red Star Balloons: The package includes 10 pcs 18 Inches star foil balloons, 1* white ribbon + 1* straw. Our large 18-inch red star foil balloons are eye-catching enough to make your party decorations stand out

Material: Our red star balloons are made of advanced material aluminum foil, which is non-toxic and harmless. Air or helium can be injected into the balloon, which can inflate the balloon well, and the advanced material that it will not burst easily, suitable for party decoration

Easy to Use: The red star balloons can be inflated with air or helium without any skill. This star foil balloon adopts self-sealing design, you only need to press the inflation port to seal it after finishing inflate, which is easy and convenient to decorate your party

Wide Application: Our star foil balloons are suitable for birthday parties, anniversaries, weddings, graduations, retirements, baby showers, Halloween, New Years, or any other party decoration you want! The star balloons are suitable for any occasion, and the colors will make your party extravagant

Warm Tips：Wish you a unforgettable party! Due to the thermal expansion and contraction characteristics of foil balloons, please avoid filling it with more than 90% air or helium. If over-inflated, it can easily cause the balloon to explode at high temperatures. Please avoid placing balloons in an outdoor high temperature environment for a long time. If the ambient temperature is too low, it will also cause the balloon to deflate, it can be slowly re-inflated
